questions.question: What is a fundamental characteristic of a synchronous digital circuit?
options: All operations are triggered by a global clock signal.
Data paths are always independent of timing.
It exclusively uses combinational logic gates.
There are no feedback paths between logic elements.
Its power consumption is inherently lower than asynchronous circuits.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of floorplanning in the physical design phase of an Application-Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC)?
options: To perform detailed routing of standard cell connections.
To determine the initial placement of large macro-blocks, I/O pins, and power distribution networks.
To synthesize the Register Transfer Level (RTL) code into gate-level netlist.
To verify that all design rules (DRC) are met before tape-out.
To extract parasitic resistances and capacitances from the layout.

questions.question: What is the primary role of microcode in the design of a Complex Instruction Set Computer (CISC) processor?
options: To store the operating system kernel for faster boot times.
To define the physical layout and interconnections of the CPU components.
To implement complex instructions as a sequence of simpler, internal micro-operations.
To manage cache coherence protocols across multiple cores.
To provide high-speed temporary storage for floating-point calculations.

questions.question: In an out-of-order execution pipeline, what mechanism is primarily responsible for ensuring that instructions commit (retire) in their original program order, even if executed out of order?
options: The Branch Prediction Unit (BPU) to reduce pipeline stalls.
The Reservation Stations that hold operands for ready instructions.
The Instruction Cache (I-Cache) which fetches instructions efficiently.
The Reorder Buffer (ROB) which tracks instruction status and results.
The Memory Management Unit (MMU) for virtual to physical address translation.

questions.question: In Static Timing Analysis (STA), what does a 'setup time violation' primarily indicate for a flip-flop?
options: The data signal arrived too early and violated the hold time requirement after the clock edge.
The clock signal arrived too late at the flip-flop compared to other parts of the chip.
There is a combinatorial feedback loop in the logic path.
The data signal did not arrive and stabilize at the flip-flop's input early enough before the active clock edge.
The output of the flip-flop cannot drive the subsequent logic within one clock cycle.
